## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on website development for an upcoming launch, addressing design, content, and technical implementation challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Launch planned for tomorrow (2025-07-01) with a minimalist V1 design, expanding to V2 with rich content later](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Confusion exists between Framer prototype and Next.js implementation; decision needed on which to use](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Content and design specifics still pending from Marcel and Renan; Ed to proceed with building scrollable sections](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Topics

### Website Version Strategy

  - [V1: Minimalist design, similar to Framer prototype but with more slides and polish](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [V2: Addition of blog and rich content (e.g., data labeling, model training, quality benchmarking)](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [V3: Potential handoff to client for further development](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### Design and Content Status

  - [Figma designs available, particularly page 3 as a reference for desired look](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Framer prototype exists but may have limitations (e.g., mobile responsiveness)](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Final logo and branding elements not yet confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Content for sections still pending from Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Ed has coded a layout with closable sidebar, similar to OpenAI's design](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Decision needed: proceed with Ed's Next.js version or use Renan's Framer prototype](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Key features to implement:](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [Scrollable sections with fading graphics](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Different backgrounds per section](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
      - [Smooth text animations and transitions](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### Client Requirements

  - [Emphasis on high-quality, minimalist design (clear typography, no rounded corners)](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Mobile-friendly implementation crucial](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Future need for interactive displays to explain complex concepts](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ed to continue building out sections in Next.js, focusing on slide-like feel and mobile responsiveness](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Jason to initiate a thread with Renan to discuss Framer vs. Next.js decision](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Await Marcel's availability to finalize copy and design decisions](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Reconvene in approximately one hour to review progress and make final decisions for tomorrow's launch](https://fathom.video/share/De8zy6fR9wy3x5y6Xg-btfsS6nnTxebC?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
